Oliver Webb's Webspace Thingy RSS Feed About Me/Contact Home

About Me

Heya, If what you wanted is contact information, here is some:

  • Email: aquahobbyist@proton.me
  • GitHub: oliverkwebb

I usually keep to myself as far as info about myself goes, but since you are interested enough to go here, here's some info about me, and what I do.

My name is, if you couldn't already guess, Oliver Webb. I am at the time of writing (April 2024) 15 and a high school student. And have been programming and learning about how computers worked for a few years now.

My main area of interest is Linux development, which I've been doing for well over a year at this point. I work on my own scripts to automate things occasionally. But lately I've been directing my effort towards the toybox project. Here's a list of the most notable scripts I've made:

  • cheat: An offline way to view cheat.sh cheat-sheets
  • moontool: A collection of fun tools adapted from older 80's tools to do stuff with moon phases.
  • ytmpv: A dmenu script that provides quick accses to proxies when youtube is being hostile "unreliable" with ad-blockers.
  • This website and it's content: A basic SSG made in makefile web content in markdown. With other scripts like a RSS feed generator.

I have a large number of snippets and dotfiles that I could link here but I never bothered to upload, maybe someday I'll post them here if anyone shows any interest.

This is not where the bulk of my experience or effort has went to, that would be to the toybox project. Which is over 200 unix command line tools in under 500 kilobytes of binary space. If you don't know about it look at it, it's cool. I've implemented several (fairly minor) commands, done a bunch of cleanup work on things like the xz decompressor and the bc implementation. Added a bunch of stuff to its vi. Among many, many other things. Like UTF-8 support in a awk implementation meant for toybox.

That's all for now, See my other stuff if you wanna know more

You can Subscribe via RSS to get updates.
